text: Review and submit the Prototype Fund application by 31 October 2026
description: Run technical, user-value, eligibility, licensing, and plain-language reviews. Ask at least two external readers to challenge the proposal. Ensure the application is self-contained and does not rely on attachments. Submit through the official platform by 31 October, ahead of the 30 November final deadline, and preserve the submitted version and confirmation.

status.comment: Felix must approve and submit through the official application platform.
